Now let's move on to the body of the presentation. So here's what I want you to do. After you transition from the open where you've said, you know, well, John, let me say this based on everything you've just said to me, this is definitely a perfect fit for you. You're transition now into the body would be now real quick, name of the company or my product is XYZ. And that's how you start the body of your presentation essentially by saying what it is that you actually have what process, what product, what program you're offering them. Okay. So it's so you get, well, based on everything you said to me, John, it's definitely a perfect fit for you. Now real quick, name of the company, if it's, you know, your stock, your recommending or name of the insurance program here. Okay. Name of our plan is XYZ. Okay. Now, as far as the exact language plans that you're going to use in your own main body of the script, I can't give you specifics here because they really do vary from industry to industry. But the important thing to remember here, and this is the key is that each language pattern should be no more than one short paragraph and it has to focus on the benefits that fill the client's needs. And it should end with make sense so far or you follow what I'm saying so far. Are you, you follow me? You get that? In other words, this language pattern, it should be no more than a paragraph. It should be focusing on a benefit that fills a client's need, not a feature. And after you're done with the pattern, you say, you follow me so far or make sense and boom, that's one language pattern. And you could put two or three at the most of those in the main body of your presentation. And then after that, you then transition into your clothes. And just one thing to remember here is that after you're done with your language pattern and you say, you know, make sense to you, you follow me so far, or if they say no, don't keep plowing on. You could only move forward down the straight line when the client says yes or agrees with you. If you move forward without them agreeing, you're in the death zone. You've broken rapport and you simply cannot close the person.
